pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code will not compile for Java 21 features if the compiler is configured for Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a snapshot version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or support Java 21 bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11; Jakarta EE annotations are required for compilation if used.
